Content: *p83221a02428* do not write in this area    do not write in this area          do not write in this area 24            *(e)  compounds of lithium (group 1) and compounds of magnesium (group 2) have  similar properties.  explain why:    the ionic radii of li+ and mg2+ are similar    the thermal decomposition of lithium nitrate is similar to that of  magnesium nitrate but different from the thermal decomposition of  sodium nitrate.     include relevant chemical equations in your answer.
